Unit 1: The Context

1. The Image (The Context)

(Imagine a high-quality, evocative photo of a bustling cafe in Monastiraki, people chatting, sipping small cups of strong Greek coffee under the warm sun. An image placeholder goes here)

2. The Power Lexis

  • Ο θόρυβος (o thó-ri-vos) - The noise
  • Γεμάτος, -η, -ο (ye-má-tos) - Full / Crowded
  • Παραγγέλνω (pa-ran-gél-no) - I order
  • Απολαμβάνω (a-po-lam-vá-no) - I enjoy

3. The Grammar Tags

Goals for this exercise: 1. Use at least one adjective in the Genitive case. 2. Use at least one verb in the Passive voice.

Pro Tip: Don't just list objects. Describe the feeling or action!

4. The Model Output

Listen to a native speaker describing the scene using the constraints above. Compare your spoken version to this native version to spot mistakes in gender agreement or stress.

Transcript: «Ο θόρυβος της γεμάτης πλατείας ακούγεται από μακριά. Όλοι απολαμβάνουν τον καφέ τους κάτω από τον ήλιο.» (The noise of the crowded square is heard from afar. Everyone is enjoying their coffee under the sun.)

Why it works: * της γεμάτης πλατείας: Genitive of the adjective "γεμάτος" matching the feminine noun "πλατεία". * ακούγεται: Passive verb (is heard), shifting focus away from "who" is making the noise to the atmosphere itself.
